# Mathieu Schmidt

> Mathieu Schmidt is a solo folk artist based in Montpellier, Occitanie (Southern France). Self-described "Desert Troubadour," he fuses Saharan desert melodies, cowboy ballads, and Occitan folk traditions. His songs are sung in French, English, and Occitan, accompanied by guitar, oud, and bouzouki.

## Genre and instruments

Folk, indie folk, world folk, troubadour, Mediterranean, desert folk, cowboy blues. Instruments: acoustic and electric guitar, oud, bouzouki, vocals.

## Service area

Montpellier, Hérault, Nîmes, Toulouse, regional festivals throughout Occitanie. Available for acoustic concerts, intimate venues, festivals, and private events.

## Pages

- [Home (French)](https://mathieu-schmidt.lourock.com/fr)
- [Home (English)](https://mathieu-schmidt.lourock.com/en)

- [Train For Rain (MP3)](https://mathieu-schmidt.lourock.com/train-for-rain.mp3)

## Booking

Part of the LouRock collective. Booking via [lourock.com](https://lourock.com) or the booking section of the site.
